title: Piquant Spring British Chicken Drumsticks Cornish Pasty
description: A tangy and springy English dish featuring chicken drumsticks in a cornish pasty, perfect for a date night, served on a tagliere with beurre-monte for dipping.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out 8 rectangles of pastry, each about 6 inches by 4 inches.
Place a chicken drumstick on one half of each rectangle, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the chicken.
Brush the edges of the pastry with a little water, then fold the other half of the pastry over the chicken and press to seal.
Use a fork to crimp the edges of the pastry and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Place the pasties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the pasties on a tagliere with beurre-monte for dipping.
